name: Toad Valley Golf Course
about: Toad Valley Golf Course is a comprehensive golf complex offering both an 18-hole outdoor course and advanced indoor simulation facilities. The venue features Golfzon simulators with moving swing plates and Toptracer technology across its driving range and simulator bays, providing a modern golf experience. It caters to a diverse clientele, from casual players and families to those seeking serious practice or event hosting, with a focus on accessibility and fun regardless of skill level.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Golfzon simulators with moving swing plates and realistic environmental feedback
Toptracer technology across the driving range and simulator bays for data and game modes
Over 200 virtual courses available for play
Food and beverage service delivered directly to the course or simulator bay
Welcoming environment for all skill levels with a focus on fun and community

food_and_drink.notes: Gourmet meals can be ordered and delivered to the fairway or simulator bay
Available on-site, with no mention of BYOB restrictions

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with moving swing plates to mimic ball lies and penalties for tall grass or sand

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The text does not specify, but it is standard practice to bring your own clubs for outdoor play and simulator sessions. Club rentals may be available at the pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue offers its own food and beverage service that can be ordered and delivered, but it does not explicitly prohibit bringing outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The text does not provide a specific time for completing 18 holes on the outdoor course.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Toad Valley is described as kid-friendly, with a mini-golf course, activities for families, and an atmosphere suitable for children.
